case_title: JOHNSON, JENNIFER L. VS JOHNSON, ELIZABETH P.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT JOHNSON, ELIZABETH P. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT JOHNSON, JENNIFER L. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, JENNIFER L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ELIZABETH P. $1,296.23 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,344.23 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
